manufacturer_from_details: вЂЋ W WIDMANN MILANO Party Fashion
description: Product Description This classic decorative whistle in elegant brown/black is the perfect accessory for anyone who wants to add the finishing touch to their costume. With its faithful shape, it looks confusingly similar to a real pipe and immediately provides an authentic look. Whether as a sailor, detective or captain, the whistle matches numerous disguises and highlights your appearance in a stylish way. With a handy length of approx. 14.5 cm, it sits comfortably in the hand and can be easily transported. Suitable for carnival, theme parties or St. Patrick's Day Parade - this accessory is a real eye-catcher and completes your outfit. Safety Warning Please note: Not suitable for minors under the age of 14, keep away from fire
